name: AXON ENTERPRISE, INC.
summary: Overview Axon Enterprise, Inc. (Axon, the Company, we or us) is a technology company that provides integrated hardware and software solutions. Founder-led since 1993, Axon began with a mission to protect life and has grown into a global technology company serving a range of customers. Our products and services allow customers across the public and private sector to capture and use critical data to support fully-connected operational workflows.
